title: Bijai Garh
tagline: Bijai Garh — heritage city of Rajasthan

overview.short: Bijai Garh, also known as Vijayamandirgarh or Bijaigarh, is a fort located in Bharatpur district.
overview.description: Bijai Garh, also known as Vijayamandirgarh or Bijaigarh, is a fort located in Bharatpur district. It is situated on Damdama Hill, an extension of the Aravalli Range and overlooking the town of Bayana. The fort was built by the Jadaun Rajput ruler Bijai Pal in the 11th century, and came under the control of various rulers over the centuries. It was captured by Ghaznavid and Ghurid armies, later by Delhi Sultanate and Mughal rulers, and mentioned by Babur and Akbar in their chronicles.

topPlaces.name: Bayana
topPlaces.description: Bayana is a historical town and the headquarters of Bayana tehsil in the Bharatpur district of Rajasthan, India. Hindaun, the nearest city to Bayana, is just 33 km (21 mi) away.

items.note: Bayana is a historical town and the headquarters of Bayana tehsil in the Bharatpur district of Rajasthan, India. Hindaun, the nearest city to Bayana, is just 33 km (21 mi) away.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bijai Garh?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bijai Garh is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bijai Garh?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Agra Airport (Pandit Deen Dayal Upadhyay) (77 km) and the nearest railway station is Agra Cantt (80 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bijai Garh?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bijai Garh at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bijai Garh?
faq.a: Stays in Bijai Garh start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
